prerequisites: An active BigMailer account with access to the console at app.bigmailer.io.
An API key generated from the BigMailer account's API key management page (this is the value for the required `api_key` config field).

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: BigMailer authenticates with an API key. Supply it as the connector's `api_key` field. BigMailer requires the key to be sent in the `X-API-Key` HTTP header on every request to the API base URL https://api.bigmailer.io/v1.

setupSteps.title: Create a BigMailer API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to your BigMailer account and open the API key management page at https://app.bigmailer.io/console/accounts/api. Click Create Key, give the key a descriptive name, and confirm. Copy the generated key value, since it is used to authenticate API calls.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key in the connector's required `api_key` field. The connector authenticates by sending this value in the `X-API-Key` header against the BigMailer API base URL https://api.bigmailer.io/v1.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credentials
setupSteps.body: Confirm the key works by issuing an authenticated request to https://api.bigmailer.io/v1/me with the `X-API-Key` header set to your key, as recommended in the BigMailer API getting started guide.
